name: FMARRDATE_Y
label: CA-2y Year of marriage to current wife
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to a woman (ssmarcoh = 1)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: HERAGEFM
label: CA-3 R's age when married to current wife
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to a woman (ssmarcoh = 1)
notes: This age was originally asked only as follow-up for those who did not report a specific mo/yr, however for user convenience has been redefined in post-processing for all applicable cases.

name: LIVTOGFS
label: CA-4 Ever cohabited premaritally with current wife
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to a woman (ssmarcoh = 1)

name: STRTCFSP_Y
label: CA-5y Year began living together w/ current wife/female cohabiting partner
universe: Applicable if R cohabited premaritally with her current wife (CA-4 LIVTOGFS = 1) or is currently cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 2)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: HERAGEF
label: CA-6 R's age when began living together w/ current wife/female cohabiting partner
universe: Applicable if R cohabited premaritally with her current wife (CA-4 LIVTOGFS = 1) or is currently cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 2)
notes: This age was originally asked only as follow-up for those who did not report a specific mo/yr, however for user convenience has been redefined in post-processing for all applicable cases.

name: CMSTRTFWP
label:
Year current union (marriage or coresidence) began with current wife/female cohabiting partner
(computed in FC C-2f)
universe: Applicable if R is currently married or cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 1 or 2)
notes: The year of this event is available for public use, and the original century-month variable is accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: ENGATFSP
label: CA-7 Engaged when began cohabiting - current wife/female cohabiting partner
universe: Applicable if R cohabited premaritally with her current wife (CA-4 LIVTOGFS = 1) or R is currently cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 2)

distribution.label: Not engaged but had definite plans to get married
Neither engaged nor had definite plans

name: WILLMARRF
label: CA-8 Does R think she will marry current female cohabiting partner?
universe: Applicable if R is currently cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 2)

label: CA-11 Highest level of education - current wife/female cohabiting partner
universe: Applicable if R is currently married or cohabiting with a woman (ssmarcoh = 1 or 2)

name: CFSPMARBF

name: SSKIDTOG

name: NSSKIDTOG
label: CA-15 Number of children together - current wife/female cohabiting partner

name: SSKIDTOG18

universe: Applicable if R has ever been married to a man (fmarit = 1, 2, 3, or 4)
